title: Auth implementation notes
summary: Implemented OAuth2 flow with refresh tokens
content:
## OAuth2 Implementation Details

### Flow
1. User clicks login → redirect to auth provider
2. Auth provider returns authorization code
3. Exchange code for access token + refresh token
4. Store refresh token securely
5. Use refresh token to get new access tokens

### Security Considerations
- Store refresh tokens in encrypted format
- Implement token rotation
- Set appropriate expiration times
- Validate redirect URIs
